message.content:
@startuml
participant "客户端" as Client
participant "AMS" as AMS
participant "UserControl" as UserControl

Client -> AMS : registerUserSwitchObserver(IUserSwitchObserver)
note right of Client
注册回调接口
end note

AMS -> UserControl : registerUserSwitchObserver(IUserSwitchObserver)

Client -> AMS : switchUser()
AMS -> UserControl : startUser()

note right of UserControl
执行切换用户动作，发送REPORT_USER_SWITCH_MSG
end note

UserControl -> UserControl : dispatchUserSwitch

UserControl -> Client : IUserSwitchObserver.onUserSwitching(newUserId, callback)

note right of UserControl
通知客户端处理完用户切换后回调传递的callback来通知AMS
end note

Client -> UserControl : IRemoteCallback.sendResult()

note right of UserControl
等待所有客户端处理完成之后继续进行切换用户的工作
end note

UserControl -> UserControl : continueUserSwitch()

note right of UserControl
结束冻屏，并停止在后台的访客用户
end note

UserControl -> UserControl : dispatchUserSwitchComplete()

note right of UserControl
通过回调方法通知客户端进行用户切换的收尾工作
end note

UserControl -> Client : IUserSwitchObserver.onUserSwitchComplete(userId)

@enduml
